steps.label: Intake Initiation and Member Demographics
steps.description: On this screen, you will begin a new intake process and enter demographic and contact information for each member involved. Please carefully fill out all required fields to ensure accurate client identification and communication. Guidance is provided for each field, and you will be prompted to select notification preferences and consent. This is the first step in creating a record for the intake process. Review all information before proceeding.

fields.label: Email Address
fields.error_message: A valid email address is required.

fields.label: Phone Number
fields.error_message: A valid phone number is required.

fields.label: Consent to Receive Notifications
fields.error_message: Consent to receive notifications is required.

fields.label: Preferred Notification Method
fields.error_message: Please select a preferred notification method.

data_validation: Email address must be in valid format.
Phone number must be in valid format.
Consent to receive notifications must be checked before selecting notification method.
If 'Preferred Notification Method' is 'Text Message' or 'Both', phone number must be provided.
First and last name are required.

buttons.label: Search Master Client Index (MCI)
buttons.description: Proceed to search for existing client records in the Master Client Index using the entered information.

steps.label: Search Master Client Index (MCI)
steps.description: Use entered Name, Date of Birth, and Social Security Number to query the Master Client Index (MCI). If a match is found, display match details for confirmation. If no match, allow creation of a new client record.

rules.label: MCI Search Query
rules.logic: When the Intake Worker initiates a search, use the entered First Name, Middle Name (if provided), and Last Name to query the Master Client Index (MCI) for existing client records.

rules.label: Match Found
rules.logic: If the MCI returns one or more matching records based on the search criteria, display the details of the matched client(s) to the Intake Worker for confirmation.

rules.label: No Match Found
rules.logic: If the MCI does not return any matching records, prompt the Intake Worker to proceed with the creation of a new client record.

steps.label: Client Record Review and Confirmation
steps.description: On this screen, you will review the details of any matched client records found in the Master Client Index (MCI). If a match is found, confirm the details before proceeding. If no match is found, you will be prompted to create a new client record. Carefully verify all displayed information to prevent duplicate records and ensure data accuracy. You may choose to confirm the match or initiate the creation of a new record.
data_validation: If a match is found, confirm that the client details are correct before proceeding.
If no match is found, ensure all required fields are present before creating a new client record.
Prevent duplicate client records by verifying matched details.
First and last name must be present in matched record.

buttons.label: Confirm Match
buttons.description: Confirm the matched client record and proceed with the intake process.

buttons.label: Create New Client Record
buttons.description: Initiate the creation of a new client record if no match is found.

steps.label: Create New Client Record
steps.description: Persist all entered demographic and domain-specific information as a new client record in the database. Log the creation event.

rules.label: Persist Client Data
rules.logic: When the Intake Worker confirms creation of a new client record, save all entered demographic and domain-specific information (First Name, Middle Name, Last Name) to the client database.

rules.label: Log Creation Event
rules.logic: Record an event in the system audit log indicating that a new client record has been created, including timestamp and Intake Worker identifier.
